title: Keep it real! 2026
summary: "Keep it REAL! 2026" will offer participants the opportunity to explore what it takes to write a solid Youth Exchange application. This course is primarily aimed at those with little or no experience in applying for international youth mobility grants.
participants_from: Armenia, Georgia, Moldova, Ukraine, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries

title: SoliDARE - Meeting for organisations active in ESC in programme & partner countries
summary: SoliDARE community event in Tallinn brings together European Solidarity Corps organisations and practitioners to reconnect, exchange experiences, strengthen the ESC community, and help shape the future of EU volunteering.
participants_from: Eastern Partnership countries, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Southern Mediterranean countries, Western Balkan countries

title: Generation Lab - practice lab on intergenerational solidarity and dialogue
summary: A 3-day practice lab on intergenerational solidarity  will allow (youth) professionals to reflect on, exchange, and analyse existing practices, in order to develop approaches better suited to current and future societal needs.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: Online Youthpass Meeting for beneficiaries
summary: Online meeting for programme beneficiaries to introduce and discuss Youthpass, as a tool to strenghten the learning and recognition in the EU youth programmes

title: Healthy Volunteering And Local Activism 2 Youth Work
summary: This training course supports youth workers in developing skills in non-formal education, youth engagement and community development, empowering them to promote active citizenship, volunteering and healthy lifestyles among young people.
participants_from: Bulgaria, Estonia, Germany, Greece, Italy, Latvia, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovenia

title: Home, Sweet City
summary: A training for youth workers on strengthening the emotional connection of young people in the border cities of  Estonia and Latvia.

title: OPEN INTERNATIONAL CALL Green Europe Bologna ITALY
summary: ERASMUS+ Project in Bologna ITALY, participants Netherlands and Italy - 14-22 JUNE 2026

title: International Call - Training Course "Music as a tool for youth growth" in ITALY
summary:
Training Course
" Music as a tool for youth growth " in Italy

14-22 June 2026

International call for participants from The Netherlands and Italy for an Erasmus+ Training Course

title: Inclusive cities lenses : Introducing video intro youth work
summary: How can we make cities more sustainable, inclusive and fair and how can we adress this topic through video making  ? By the end of the project, you won’t just talk about change - you will film it.

title: Media Education Academy
summary: Media Education Academy is an Erasmus+ project helping educators develop media literacy, critical thinking, and digital safety skills through practical, game-based methods to navigate misinformation and online challenges.
participants_from: Austria, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Moldova, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Ukraine, Western Balkan countries

title: Creating something that doesn't yet exist it has to be the ambition of all who are alive - 28° National Week of the Method of Liberation and Conscientization by Paulo Freire
summary: A week with the method of the Brazilian pedagogist Paulo Freire, according to the reworking and adaptation carried out by Gino Piccio
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: The Power of Non Formal Education in French / Le Pouvoir de l'éducation non formelle
summary: Training in French. Improving impact of Non Formal Education (NFE). Améliorer l'impact, les principes et les méthodes de l'ENF pour inviter les jeunes à être acteurs de changements sociaux. Repenser nos pratiques, en français.

title: The Playbook for Inclusion: Socio-Sports Leadership
summary: Focus on suppot young sport educator who want to use sport as a tool of inclusion. To promote diversity in sports and increase awareness of gender equality. Aimed for youth NGO that work with non-formal education for youth empowerment.
participants_from: Algeria, Armenia, Austria, Azerbaijan, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Egypt, Estonia, Finland, France, Georgia, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Jordan, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Morocco, Netherlands, Norway, Palestine, Poland, Portugal, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Tunisia, Türkiye, Ukraine

title: PBA Make the Move for Green Inclusion V
summary: PBA is organised to find good reliable partners for youth exchanges with a focus on inclusion and "green" and to understand the needs for a YE of good quality. For this time, youth workers and young people from same structures will come together.

title: Youth+: How to help youth with fewer/less opportunities grow in volunteering projects
summary:
An online course for youth workers to learn: 
- how to approach a group of youth with fewer opportunities,
- how to involve them, to create their own volunteering project to help a community in need,
- how to train, coach, mentor and support them.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU
